allow: Bash(python -c "from testcode.cli import app; print\([c for c in app.registered_commands]\)")
Bash(python -c "from testcode.cli import app; [print\(c.name\) for c in app.registered_commands]")
Bash(python -c "from testcode.cli import app, api_test, perf_test; print\('api_test func:', api_test\); print\('perf_test func:', perf_test\); print\('OK'\)")
